title: Weather Shower
description: A mod that shows part of the day or the weather
body:
### Weather Shower is a lightweight and stylish mod that displays the current time of day or weather in your Minecraft world using both text and a matching icon. Whether it's sunrise, daylight, sunset, night, rain, or thunder — you'll always know what’s happening around you!!!

# 🛠 Features:

**Shows the time of day: 🌅 Morning, ☀️ Day, 🌇 Evening, 🌙 Night**

**Displays current weather: 🌧️ Rain, ⛈️ Thunder**

**Icon + text overlay for clarity and immersion**

**Works in any biome and dimension**

**Simple and clean UI integration**

# 🌍 Supported Languages:

**🇩🇪 German (Deutsch)**

**🇫🇷 French (Français)**

**🇪🇸 Spanish (Español)**

**🇬🇧 English**

**🇺🇦 Ukrainian**

**🇯🇵 Japanese (日本語)**

**🇵🇱 Polish (Polski)**

**🇨🇳 Chinese (中文)
**
